title: ERROR422
description: Unofficial port of the creepypasta version ERROR422 as a mod for modern versions.
body:
# NOTE: This mod has possible jumpscares.
If you are sensitive to this, it's advised to not use this mod.

# ERROR422
*Unofficial port of a creepypasta version.*

## Features
* Random events happening in the world.
* ERR422 aka. Glitch (shows up at around 40 to 70 minutes in-game)
* Glitched loading and title screen.
* And many more!
